name: Pina Colada Wedges
recipeIngredient: 2 2/3 cups Shredded coconut (7 oz angel flake)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat cream cheese with sugar and rum until smooth.
2. Fold in 2 cups of the whipped topping, pineapple mixture, and 2 cups of coconut into the cream cheese mixture.
3. Spread the mixture into an 8-inch layer pan lined with plastic wrap.
4. Invert the pan onto a serving plate, removing the pan and plastic wrap.
5. Spread the remaining whipped topping over the top.
6. Sprinkle the remaining shredded coconut over the top.
7. Freeze until firm, about 2 hours.
8. Cut into wedges. Garnish with pineapple and cherries if desired.
